consumer: future abyss-stack bridge and future local agents
purpose: Read-only host-to-stack handoff contract for machine facts, AI capability evidence, and local chronicle artifacts.

contract.dependency_direction: abyss-stack may consume abyss-machine; abyss-machine must not import or mutate abyss-stack

mutation_gates: abyss-machine storage write-preflight --kind KIND --bytes BYTES --target PATH --json
non_claims: This bridge does not start abyss-stack services.
This bridge does not write to abyss-stack, AoA, work, or games roots.
Synthesis candidates are cited summaries for orientation, not canonical truth.
Stack-owned runtime promotion decisions remain inside abyss-stack.
Work-mode plan is host-side launch policy, not a stack runtime launcher.
Memory plan gates new starts only; it does not kill, swap, reconfigure zram, enable oomd, tune sysctl, throttle, or re-affinitize existing processes.
Resource launch applies cgroup/systemd policy to new processes only; it does not kill, throttle, re-affinitize, or migrate existing user, game, work, or stack processes.

mode_bridge.contract: Stack-side launchers should consume mode plan before starting heavy local AI or sustained agent work.

commands.cpu_launch: abyss-machine ai cpu launch --class CLASS -- COMMAND...

process_thermal_bridge.contract: Stack-side launchers may consume game guard, thermal plan and CPU route evidence before starting new heavy local work; host layer does not mutate existing stack, user process affinity, or active games.
process_thermal_bridge.game_contract: Active games block default heavy/sustained host launch wrappers and unattended medium-or-heavier launches; Steam helpers alone are platform context, not an active game.

protected_roots.reason: Abyss OS project material. Host storage automation may read bridge evidence but must not write or clean here.
Stack repository/model material under reformation; host layer must not mutate it.
Stack/service material; host layer must not mutate it.
User source repository; host layer must not mutate it.
Operator-owned game library. Never a machine cleanup/write target.
Operator-owned game library. Never a machine cleanup/write target.
Freelance/work projects. Machine-owned data must not be routed here.
Work mount/path. Machine-owned data must not be routed here.

memory_bridge.contract: Future stack-side launchers may consume memory plan before starting medium/heavy/sustained local work; host memory subsystem writes facts and gates new starts only.
memory_bridge.protected_context: Dictation, games, work projects, project repositories, and existing user processes must be reported before any operator action; this route never mutates them automatically.

resource_bridge.contract: Future stack-side launchers may consume resource plan as the unified host decision over mode, memory, storage, game guard, thermal plan, and CPU route.
resource_bridge.execution: Resource launch uses user systemd transient services/scopes with AllowedCPUs, CPUWeight, IOWeight, and soft MemoryHigh for new processes only.

nervous_quality_bridge.contract: Use the quality audit before relying on local memory, synthesis, or stack bridge handoff material.
nervous_quality_bridge.non_claim: Quality audit is evidence-only; it does not execute user intent, mutate repositories, or take automatic actions.

heartbeat_bridge.contract: Stack-side readers may consume heartbeat readmodel fields only after heartbeats validate proves the stable field set.
heartbeat_bridge.non_claim: Heartbeat bridge is evidence-only; it does not execute reactions, responses, browser diagnostics, model review, cleanup, or stack promotion.

stack_observability_bridge.contract: Use this read-only snapshot to verify abyss-stack Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Alloy, PromQL, and LogQL availability from the host layer.
stack_observability_bridge.non_claim: Stack observability bridge reads host endpoints and stack container network probes only; it does not import, write, start, stop, or reconfigure abyss-stack.

self_awareness_bridge.contract: Read-only causal-temporal-spatial understanding layer over stack observability and host readmodels.
self_awareness_bridge.non_claim: Self-awareness is evidence and owner-gated reaction routing; it does not mutate abyss-stack, execute remediation, or claim root cause without cited evidence.

typing_bridge.contract: Use typing coverage and causal-context to answer what was written, where it was written, to whom it was routed, and which task/context it belonged to.
typing_bridge.non_claim: Typing bridge is committed-text evidence only; it is not raw keylogging and does not authorize automatic action.
